# Beads for the universal harness interface refactor.
#
# Governing specs:
#   - docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-014-universal-harness-interface.md
#   - docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md
#   - docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
#
# Sequencing note: beads in the 5x, 6x, 7x groups (per-harness migrations)
# can run in parallel with each other once 04 lands, but each group's
# sub-sequence (a → b → c → d → e → f) is strictly ordered. 08, 09 can
# start after 04 lands. 10, 11, 12 are tail-end and depend on prior
# migrations completing.

beads:
  # ----- Phase 0: Baseline and contract scaffolding -----

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00
    title: "Pre-refactor baseline: pin CONTRACT-003 JSON fixtures and runtime baseline; grep cmd/ and root for hidden per-harness imports"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "testdata/contract-003/pre-refactor/ contains JSON fixtures for HarnessInfo, ProviderInfo, QuotaState, AccountStatus across all five harnesses and one subscription-backed provider"
      - "grep -rEn 'internal/harnesses/(claude|codex|gemini|opencode|pi)' --include='*.go' . (excluding the harness packages, node_modules, .claude/worktrees, benchmark-results, .ddx) is captured verbatim in the PR description; any file not in the plan's Service-side consumers or Tests inventory tables is added"
      - "testdata/perf-baselines/2026-05-14-pre-refactor.txt records go test -count=1 ./... -timeout 30m wall time"
      - "go test ./... -count=1 passes with fixtures committed"
    depends_on: []

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-01
    title: "Add Harness sub-interfaces and universal types (CONTRACT-004 Step 1)"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "internal/harnesses/types.go declares QuotaHarness, AccountHarness, ModelDiscoveryHarness interfaces with the CONTRACT-004 signatures including SupportedLimitIDs() and SupportedAliases()"
      - "internal/harnesses/types.go declares QuotaStatus, AccountSnapshot, QuotaStateValue, RoutingPreference types and ErrAliasNotResolvable sentinel"
      - "Unit tests cover RoutingPreference enum identity, QuotaStateValue string mapping, sentinel error identity"
      - "No harness implements the new interfaces yet; service code is unchanged; go test ./... passes"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02
    title: "Conformance suite and synthetic harness implementations"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "internal/harnesses/harnesstest package exports RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance"
      - "Synthetic constructors NewSyntheticQuotaHarness, NewSyntheticAccountHarness, NewSyntheticModelDiscoveryHarness accept Supported* values as parameters"
      - "Conformance suite asserts emitted Windows[].LimitID is a subset of SupportedLimitIDs(); asserts ResolveModelAlias covers SupportedAliases() positive path and rejects out-of-set with ErrAliasNotResolvable"
      - "Suite asserts contract shape of single-flight (no error, consistent post-state on concurrent RefreshQuota), not exact probe count"
      - "Smoke test runs synthetic harnesses against the conformance suite and passes"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-01

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-03
    title: "CONTRACT-003 projection helpers (projectQuotaStatus, projectAccountSnapshot)"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_projection.go (or equivalent) exports projectQuotaStatus(harnesses.QuotaStatus) *QuotaState and projectAccountSnapshot(harnesses.AccountSnapshot) *AccountStatus"
      - "Helpers drive every QuotaStateValue, every RoutingPreference, populated and empty Account/Detail, present and absent Reason in unit tests"
      - "Tests assert public JSON shape matches BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00 fixtures structurally"
      - "No service code calls the helpers yet — they exist for Phase 5+"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-04
    title: "Async refresh scheduler and harnessByName helper"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Service struct gains a harnessByName(name string) harnesses.Harness method consulting the registered-harnesses field"
      - "service_refresh_scheduler.go owns a debounced ticker per registered QuotaHarness firing at QuotaFreshness()/2 and per AccountHarness whose AccountFreshness() differs from quota"
      - "Scheduler discovers harnesses by iterating service.harnessByName over the registry and type-asserting to QuotaHarness / AccountHarness independently"
      - "Scheduler reads QuotaStatus before each potential refresh to obtain CapturedAt; on cache-cold (State=QuotaUnavailable) the scheduler always calls RefreshQuota"
      - "Scheduler skips a tick when last-known QuotaStatus.CapturedAt is within QuotaFreshness() of now (cache-freshness dedup is the scheduler's job, not RefreshQuota's)"
      - "Startup refresh kickoff fires once on scheduler construction for every registered QuotaHarness / AccountHarness with a cache-cold state, per the cache-cold path in primary-harness-capability-baseline.md"
      - "Fake-clock tests prove debounce cadence, single-flight respect via cache lock, startup kickoff, and clean ctx cancel"
      - "Per-harness Refresh*Async helpers remain in place for now (deleted in each harness's e-step)"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02

  # ----- Phase 5: Claude migration sub-sequence (strictly ordered) -----

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05A
    title: "claude.Runner: add CONTRACT-004 interface methods (additive; old surface still present)"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "claude.Runner implements QuotaStatus, RefreshQuota, QuotaFreshness, SupportedLimitIDs, AccountStatus, RefreshAccount, AccountFreshness, DefaultModelSnapshot, ResolveModelAlias, SupportedAliases"
      - "RefreshQuota probes unconditionally and uses the existing cache lock for single-flight (queued callers consume in-flight result)"
      - "Routing-preference mapping helper translates today's PreferClaude+freshness into RoutingPreference"
      - "package claude doc comment (doc.go or runner.go top) mirrors SupportedLimitIDs() and SupportedAliases() return values"
      - "harnesstest.RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance all pass against &claude.Runner{}"
      - "Old per-harness cache I/O functions still exported and unchanged; both surfaces coexist"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-04

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05B
    title: "Migrate service.go claude consumers to QuotaHarness/AccountHarness interface"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service.go drops the claudeharness import"
      - "Every claude-related call in service.go fetches the runner via harnessByName, type-asserts to the sub-interface, and projects through service_projection helpers"
      - "go test ./... passes; BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00 fixtures pass structural diff for claude rows"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05A
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-03

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05C
    title: "Migrate service_providers.go claude consumers"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_providers.go drops claudeharness imports for claude paths"
      - "ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{} construction at service_providers.go:620 moves inside claude.Runner.RefreshQuota"
      - "Health-check callbacks become qh.RefreshQuota(ctx) calls"
      - "go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass"

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05D
    title: "Migrate service_models.go and service_subscription_quota.go claude consumers"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_models.go uses ModelDiscoveryHarness for claude alias resolution"
      - "service_subscription_quota.go consumes QuotaStatus.RoutingPreference; claudeQuotaMaxUsedPercent derives over QuotaStatus.Windows uniformly across claude and codex"
      - "Type assertion on *claudeharness.ClaudeQuotaSnapshot at service_subscription_quota.go:79 is removed"
      - "go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass"

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05E
    title: "Delete and unexport claude public surface"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:

      - "ReadClaudeQuotaViaPTY, RefreshClaudeQuotaViaPTY, ReadClaudeQuotaFromCassette, DefaultClaudeModelDiscovery, ResolveClaudeFamilyAlias, ReadClaudeReasoningFromHelp, IsClaudeQuotaExhaustedMessage, MarkClaudeQuotaExhaustedFromMessage unexported"
      - "RefreshClaudeQuotaAsync deleted; the Step 4 scheduler now drives claude refresh cadence"
      - "Pre-merge check: reverting only this bead (without reverting 05A–05D) leaves the tree compiling and tests green"
      - "go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass"

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05F

    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

      - "service_status_test.go, service_subscription_quota_test.go, service_routing_errors_test.go, service_providers_test.go, service_routing_test.go, harness_golden_integration_test.go no longer reference claudeharness exports beyond the dispatcher constructor"
      - "internal/harnesses/claude/*_test.go files run as package claude (white-box) where they need unexported helpers"

279	// Harness is the internal contract every harness implementation in
280	// internal/harnesses/<name> satisfies. It is the minimal surface the agent
281	// dispatcher needs to route a resolved request into a backend.
282	//
283	// A Harness is responsible for emitting events on the returned channel until
284	// execution completes; the channel MUST be closed after the final event so
285	// downstream consumers can detect end-of-stream. The final event is always
286	// of type EventTypeFinal.
287	type Harness interface {
288		// Info returns identity + capability metadata for this harness.
289		Info() HarnessInfo

291		// HealthCheck triggers a fresh probe (binary present, auth ok, etc.)
292		// and returns nil if the harness is ready to execute.
293		HealthCheck(ctx context.Context) error

296		// channel; a single final event closes the stream. The first error
297		// return is reserved for setup failures (binary missing, etc.) — once
298		// the channel is returned, all per-run failures are reported via a
299		// final event with Status != "success".
300		Execute(ctx context.Context, req ExecuteRequest) (<-chan Event, error)

415		// is reported as a QuotaStatus with State=QuotaUnavailable (or

13	// RunHarnessConformance asserts the contract every harnesses.Harness
14	// implementation MUST honor:
15	//
16	//   - Info returns a HarnessInfo with a non-empty Name.
17	//   - HealthCheck is callable with a non-nil context and either
18	//     returns nil or a non-nil error; the suite does not invoke any
19	//     binary and does not assert a particular outcome.
20	//   - Execute honors the setup-vs-runtime error contract documented on
21	//     the Harness interface: a non-nil error means the returned
22	//     channel is nil; a nil error means the returned channel is
23	//     non-nil. The suite drives Execute with an already-cancelled
24	//     context to keep real harnesses from launching real binaries.
25	//
26	// The suite is safe to run against in-memory synthetic harnesses and
27	// against real harnesses (e.g. &claude.Runner{}); in the latter case
28	// Execute typically returns an error because the binary path is empty
29	// or the context is cancelled before setup completes.
30	func RunHarnessConformance(t *testing.T, h harnesses.Harness) {
31		t.Helper()
32		if h == nil {
33			t.Fatal("RunHarnessConformance called with nil harness")
34		}
35	
36		t.Run("Info", func(t *testing.T) {
37			info := h.Info()
38			if info.Name == "" {
39				t.Error("Info().Name is empty")
40			}
41		})
42	
43		t.Run("HealthCheck", func(t *testing.T) {
44			ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 2*time.Second)
45			defer cancel()
46			// Either nil or error is acceptable; the contract is that the
47			// call returns without panicking.
48			_ = h.HealthCheck(ctx)
49		})
50	
51		t.Run("ExecuteSetupVsRuntimeContract", func(t *testing.T) {
52			ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
53			cancel()
54			ch, err := h.Execute(ctx, harnesses.ExecuteRequest{})
55			if err != nil {
56				if ch != nil {
57					t.Fatalf("Execute returned non-nil channel together with error %v", err)
58				}
59				return
60			}
61			if ch == nil {
62				t.Fatal("Execute returned nil channel with nil error")
63			}
64			// Drain whatever the harness already enqueued so we don't leak
65			// goroutines. Bound it so real harnesses cannot hang the suite.
66			drainCtx, drainCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 2*time.Second)
67			defer drainCancel()

71				case _, ok := <-ch:
72					if !ok {

74					}
75				case <-drainCtx.Done():
76					// Harness owns the channel; we don't fail the
77					// contract on a stuck producer here — the
78					// Execute-event contract has its own dedicated
79					// tests elsewhere. Stop draining.
80					drained = true
81				}
82			}
83		})
